sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n11287" key="a)pale/chsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπᾰλέξ-ησις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n11287.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">defence,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τινός</foreign> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">against</tr_> a thing, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phot.</author></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
